subject: [PATCH nfs-utils 16/17] exportfs: use netlink to probe kernel support, skip export_test

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: The patch looks good, but the author should consider adding a comment to explain why the netlink family is being used instead of the /proc interface.

2026-03-16.patch_summary: This patch refactors the exportfs module to use netlink to probe kernel support for new cache interfaces, allowing it to skip an advisory export test.
